_doc: Committed >=90 council rating for Epic #2508 Phase-0 (marketplace-extension synthesis). 3 GENUINELY DISJOINT non-Anthropic families, web-grounded, cited the AC content, chance-corrected (Gwet AC1 over binary meets-bar>=90).
